race.comment: CACCHIONE (3) resumes in a winnable affair. His debut at Moonee Valley when second reads very well for this, thought highly enough of to tackle a G3 race there next time out. This is much, much easier and he should take a power of beating. ANGLING FOR INFO (1) resumes. He showed ability in three runs last time in, placing in a couple before the break. He's got early speed and can give a sight. BOLD AMORE (2) is going okay, fourth in a potentially stronger maiden last time at Seymour when getting home well. Riordan booked is a positive, he can figure. COORANGA (4) is a gelding by Street Boss on debut for the Shaun Nolen yard who has won a jumpout, watch the betting.TABLE TWENTYEIGHT (8) struggled last time but the Echuca run prior has him right in the mix.
